svg.aria-label: Fadi, 0xmortuex — 9th grade, Istanbul. Builds compilers, kernels, browsers and security tools. Mort: a programming language written from scratch. MORT OS: an OS kernel written in Mort that boots on real hardware. Vex: a desktop browser with a built-in AI agent. FlashMind: an AI study engine with OCR and spaced repetition.
